statement: NIST AI RMF 1.0 was released 26 January 2023; its Generative AI Profile NIST AI 600-1 was published 26 July 2024 with 12 GenAI risk categories.

evidence.quote: The AI RMF was released in January 2023 ... released on January 26, 2023
NIST AI Risk Management Framework: Generative Artificial Intelligence Profile was published on July 26, 2024, with the official designation NIST AI 600-1

falsifier: NIST publishing AI RMF 2.0 or re-dating AI 600-1 would alter these version anchors.
